task_completion.description: Verify the Notes or Description field was updated for failing standard assets (EQ-FCA-001 or EQ-FCA-003).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of OpenMaint showing the asset record for EQ-FCA-001 or EQ-FCA-003 with the Notes/Description field containing exactly 'FCA 2026: Condition 2 - Severe corrosion on coils' (for 001) or 'FCA 2026: Condition 1 - Cracked heat exchanger shell' (for 003).

task_completion.description: Verify the Notes or Description field was updated for passing standard assets (EQ-FCA-002 or EQ-FCA-004).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of OpenMaint showing the asset record for EQ-FCA-002 or EQ-FCA-004 with the Notes/Description field containing 'FCA 2026: Condition 4 - Operating within parameters' (for 002) or 'FCA 2026: Condition 5 - Newly installed' (for 004).

task_completion.description: Verify the Notes or Description field was updated for the heritage asset (EQ-FCA-005).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of OpenMaint showing the asset record for EQ-FCA-005 with the Notes/Description field containing 'FCA 2026: Condition 2 - Engine block fatigue - historic unit'.

task_completion.description: Verify a Corrective Maintenance work order was created for EQ-FCA-001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a work order in OpenMaint linked to EQ-FCA-001. The work order must be of type 'Corrective Maintenance', have a 'Critical' priority, and the description must be 'Capital Replacement Request for EQ-FCA-001'.

task_completion.description: Verify a Corrective Maintenance work order was created for EQ-FCA-003.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a work order in OpenMaint linked to EQ-FCA-003. The work order must be of type 'Corrective Maintenance', have a 'Critical' priority, and the description must be 'Capital Replacement Request for EQ-FCA-003'.

task_completion.description: Verify no work order was created for the Heritage asset (EQ-FCA-005) despite its failing score.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the work order list in OpenMaint showing requests for 001 and 003, but explicitly missing any 'Capital Replacement Request' for EQ-FCA-005, EQ-FCA-002, or EQ-FCA-004.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenMaint web GUI to perform the updates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenMaint web interface in a browser, not terminal windows executing curl commands, python scripts, or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Elements/Console tab) should not be open and used to modify the DOM to fake the presence of work orders or notes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual form fields in OpenMaint.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture intermediate steps of the agent typing or pasting the required text into the OpenMaint input fields and clicking save/submit buttons.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV file contains 5 assets. EQ-FCA-001 (Score 2, Standard) and EQ-FCA-003 (Score 1, Standard) MUST have 'Corrective Maintenance' work orders created with 'Critical' priority and description 'Capital Replacement Request for [Asset Code]'. EQ-FCA-002 (Score 4) and EQ-FCA-004 (Score 5) do NOT get work orders because their scores are > 2. EQ-FCA-005 (Score 2, Heritage) MUST NOT get a work order because it is a Heritage asset. ALL 5 assets must have their Notes/Description updated with the format 'FCA 2026: Condition [Score] - [InspectorNotes]'.
